entity.label: Baalhanan
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A king of Edom, son of Achbor (Gen. 36:38, 39; 1 Chr. 1:49, 50).

nodes.label: Baalhanan
nodes.description: A king of Edom, son of Achbor (Gen. 36:38, 39; 1 Chr. 1:49, 50).

verses.text: And Saul died, and Baalhanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.
And Baalhanan the son of Achbor died, and Hadar reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Pau; and his wife’s name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.
And when Shaul was dead, Baalhanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.
And when Baalhanan was dead, Hadad reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Pai; and his wife’s name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.
